THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ASHTON, TRACY $13,643.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,643.18, (1.)
